description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Andy's PHP Knowledgebase (Aphpkb) before 0.95.8 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) HTTP Referer header to saa.php, (2) username parameter to login.php, or (3) keyword_list parameter to keysearch.php.
references:

http://osvdb.org/101492

http://sourceforge.net/p/aphpkb/code/91
http://aphpkb.blogspot.dk/2013/12/release-of-aphpkb-0958.html
http://osvdb.org/101467
http://osvdb.org/101491
http://secunia.com/advisories/56228
https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2013-7277
